# CYNTAX INNOVATIONS

CYNTAX INNOVATIONS is a Uganda-registered technology company specialising in custom software development, enterprise resource planning (ERP) implementations, digital strategy, and AI-powered business solutions for organisations in Uganda and across Africa.

## Products
- ZentroApp: An EFRIS-compliant POS and inventory management platform for Ugandan retailers, restaurants, and multi-branch businesses.

## Services
- Custom Software Development
- Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Implementation
- API Integrations & Automation
- Digital Strategy Consulting
- Mobile App Development

## Location
Kampala, Uganda

## Contact
hello@cyntaxinnovations.com
https://www.cyntaxinnovations.com
